import * as React from "react"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const Table = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLTableElement,
  React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableElement>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <div className={tw.style({
        position: "relative",
        width: "w-full",
        overflow: "overflow-auto",
    }).class()}>
    <table
      ref={ref}
      className={tw.def([className], {
          width: "w-full",
          captionSide: "caption-bottom",
          fontSize: "text-sm",
      })}
      {...props}
    />
  </div>
))
Table.displayName = "Table"

const TableHeader = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLTableSectionElement,
  React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableSectionElement>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <thead ref={ref} className={tw.def([className], {
        "[&_tr]": {
            borderWidth: "[&_tr]:border-b",
        },
    })} {...props} />
))
TableHeader.displayName = "TableHeader"

const TableBody = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLTableSectionElement,
  React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableSectionElement>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <tbody
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.def([className], {
        "[&_tr:last-child]": {
            borderWidth: "[&_tr:last-child]:border-0",
        },
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
TableBody.displayName = "TableBody"

const TableFooter = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLTableSectionElement,
  React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableSectionElement>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <tfoot
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.def([className], {
        borderWidth: "border-t",
        backgroundColor: "bg-muted/50",
        fontWeight: "font-medium",
        "[&>tr]": {
            last: {
                borderWidth: "[&>tr]:last:border-b-0",
            },
        },
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
TableFooter.displayName = "TableFooter"

const TableRow = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLTableRowElement,
  React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableRowElement>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <tr
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.def([className], {
        borderWidth: "border-b",
        transitionProperty: "transition-colors",
        hover: {
            backgroundColor: "hover:bg-muted/50",
        },
        "data-[state=selected]": {
            backgroundColor: "data-[state=selected]:bg-muted",
        },
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
TableRow.displayName = "TableRow"

const TableHead = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLTableCellElement,
  React.ThHTMLAttributes<HTMLTableCellElement>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <th
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.def([className], {
        height: "h-10",
        padding: "px-2",
        textAlign: "text-left",
        verticalAlign: "align-middle",
        fontWeight: "font-medium",
        color: "text-muted-foreground",
        "[&:has([role=checkbox])]": {
            padding: "[&:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0",
        },
        "[&>[role=checkbox]]": {
            translate: "[&>[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px]",
        },
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
TableHead.displayName = "TableHead"

const TableCell = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLTableCellElement,
  React.TdHTMLAttributes<HTMLTableCellElement>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <td
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.def([className], {
        padding: "p-2",
        verticalAlign: "align-middle",
        "[&:has([role=checkbox])]": {
            padding: "[&:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0",
        },
        "[&>[role=checkbox]]": {
            translate: "[&>[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px]",
        },
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
TableCell.displayName = "TableCell"

const TableCaption = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLTableCaptionElement,
  React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableCaptionElement>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <caption
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.def([className], {
        margin: "mt-4",
        fontSize: "text-sm",
        color: "text-muted-foreground",
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
TableCaption.displayName = "TableCaption"

export {
  Table,
  TableHeader,
  TableBody,
  TableFooter,
  TableHead,
  TableRow,
  TableCell,
  TableCaption,
}
